sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطِّفْلُ يَلْعَبُ فِي الشَّارِعِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete se igralo na ulici sa prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: The child used to play in the street with his friends.

sentences.translation: Pravili su igračke od gline i drveta.
sentences.translationEn: They made toys from clay and wood.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَكُنْ لَدَيْهِمْ أَلْعَابٌ مِنَ الْمَتْجَرِ.
sentences.translationEn: They did not have shop-bought toys.

sentences.arabic: كَانُوا يَجِدُونَ الْفَرَحَ فِي الأَشْيَاءِ الْبَسِيطَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nalazili su radost u jednostavnim stvarima.
sentences.translationEn: They found joy in simple things.
